MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Freedom West Homes, Inc. is present. Represented by Paula Butler.
Attorney David Briggs appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jan-Nise Booker is present.
Attorney Kevin Frankel representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JAN-17-2012 is vacated.
